author: Luxshman
text: Very Friendly Staffs and Excellent service

author: Nimsari kodithuwakku
text:
Ideaz Prime's customer service is really good, super friendly. Especially Inshaf, who contacted me right after I made the appointment - he helped me a lot with getting the phone. Special thanks to him. Thank you, Ideaz Prime

I’m Sanugi(Happy Customer )

text: Best customer service and good products for customers highly recommend

author: Lahiru Jayan
text: Today 01/03/2026 I called in the morning and asked if I could buy an iPhone 14. They said yes they have stock and it was posted on the fb page at a discounted price. That evening when I called they said the device was out of stock. At first they said they had it. After about a minute they said no. I even went to get the money. I was very helpless.poor customer service.i never go idealz.

author: Vithya Shini (Thiru)
text:
“I would like to appreciate Mr. Arkam for his professionalism and dedication. He managed the task smoothly and ensured clear communication throughout.”

Thank you,
Vithyashini

author: Mahasen Wijesekera
text: I purchased an I phone 17 pro today. My sales agent was Imran. He was so supportive and instructed me about all the features of the phone and downloaded all the apps to my phone which was an outstanding service.
